Bash(Get-ChildItem -Path "F:\\DAD Projects\\TIS_MVC\\TIS" -Recurse -Directory)
Bash(Select-Object FullName)
Bash(sqlcmd -S '.\\SQLEXPRESS' -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q ' *)
Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q "IF OBJECT_ID\('sp_GetPkgCallTypes'\) IS NOT NULL DROP PROCEDURE sp_GetPkgCallTypes")

Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q "CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_GetPkgCallTypes @ProviderID INT AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT ID, PKG_CALLTYPE AS TransType FROM TBL_PKGCALLTYPE WHERE PROVIDER = @ProviderID ORDER BY PKG_CALLTYPE; END")
Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q "IF OBJECT_ID\('sp_GetPkgCallDesc'\) IS NOT NULL DROP PROCEDURE sp_GetPkgCallDesc")

Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q "CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_GetPkgCallDesc @CallTypeID INT AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT ID, CALLTYPEDESC AS Description FROM TBL_PKGCALLDESC WHERE CALLTYPEID = @CallTypeID ORDER BY CALLTYPEDESC; END")
Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -d TIS_KDD_NEW -Q "IF OBJECT_ID\('sp_SaveContact'\) IS NOT NULL DROP PROCEDURE sp_SaveContact")
